messages.content:
Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
While studying to become a Doctor, Spider-Man's cousin invented a cure for hiccups.
While studying to become a doctor, Spider-Man's cousin invented a cure for hiccups.
After Morgan Freeman rescued the town from the dragon, king Bob gave him three hundred gold coins.
After Morgan Freeman rescued the town from the dragon, King Bob gave him three hundred gold coins.
Since grandma friended Captain America on Facebook, the two of them have planned more activities together.
Since Grandma friended Captain America on Facebook, the two of them have planned more activities together.
Black Panther drove to the State border to see what it looked like.
Black Panther drove to the state border to see what it looked like.
Before Imelda knew about the shortcut via elm road, it took her twenty minutes to get home from the gym.
Before Imelda knew about the shortcut via Elm Road, it took her twenty minutes to get home from the gym.
Despite his talent with a yo-yo, Superman lost his toy near Park Avenue when it fell down the storm drain.
Despite his talent with a yo-yo, Superman lost his toy near Park Avenue when it fell down the storm drain. (There are no capitalization errors in this sentence.)
If I can take time off work, I will go to seattle with Goku.
If I can take time off work, I will go to Seattle with Goku.
For her report on maine, Captain Marvel made a cool PowerPoint presentation.
For her report on Maine, Captain Marvel made a cool PowerPoint presentation.
Harley Quinn can't believe how tall that Building is.
Harley Quinn can't believe how tall that building is.
Naruto wondered where he could get long black robes like the ones the Judge was wearing.
Naruto wondered where he could get long black robes like the ones the judge was wearing.
Mysterio listened to the audiobook of Matilda on his iPod.
Mysterio listened to the audiobook of Matilda on his iPod. (There are no capitalization errors in this sentence.)
"i've never seen a single chip hold that much salsa," mused Black Panther.
"I've never seen a single chip hold that much salsa," mused Black Panther.
Napping on the rug in front of the fire, Enrique Rivera's cat seemed to enjoy Winter evenings most of all.
Napping on the rug in front of the fire, Enrique Rivera's cat seemed to enjoy winter evenings most of all.
I asked Nick Fury to read me the poem "jabberwocky" before I went to bed.
I asked Nick Fury to read me the poem "Jabberwocky" before I went to bed.
Banned from the library for excessive late fees, grandma Sue asked to borrow Vin Diesel's card.
Banned from the library for excessive late fees, Grandma Sue asked to borrow Vin Diesel's card.
Ryan Reynolds wrote another verse to the poem "nothing gold can stay" for his teacher.
Ryan Reynolds wrote another verse to the poem "Nothing Gold Can Stay" for his teacher.
